english: I've been learning Russian for six days.

russian: У меня есть брат и сестра.
transliteration: U menya yest brat i sestra.
english: I have a brother and a sister.
My brother is older than me.
In the evenings we sit together.

russian: У тебя есть братья или сёстры?
transliteration: U tebya yest bratya ili syostry?
english: Do you have brothers or sisters?
I have a meeting at ten.
There was a lot of work today.
Is there pork in this dish?
Can I have the bill please?
I can make tagine for you.
I need a lot of protein.

russian: Я тренируюсь четыре раза в неделю.
transliteration: Ya treniruyus chetyre raza v nedelyu.
english: I train four times a week.
Do you go to the gym?
I want to stay in shape.
I play sometimes in the evening.
How do I get to the center?
I'm here for the first time.
Do you have a bigger size?
What do you like to do?
What music do you listen to?

russian: У тебя есть братья или сёстры?
transliteration: U tebya yest bratya ili syostry?
english: Do you have brothers or sisters?

russian: Что для тебя важно в жизни?
transliteration: Chto dlya tebya vazhno v zhizni?
english: What's important to you in life?
Would you ever want to go to Morocco?

russian: Что ты делаешь в свободное время?
transliteration: Chto ty delayesh v svobodnoye vremya?
english: What do you do in your free time?
I came to Russia for a short time.
I want to get to know Russia.
I listen more than I talk.

russian: Я не пью и не курю.
transliteration: Ya ne pyu i ne kuryu.

english: I want my own family one day.

russian: Я не могу перестать думать о тебе.
transliteration: Ya ne mogu perestat dumat o tebe.
english: I can't stop thinking about you.
I want to get to know you better.

russian: Куда ты хочешь поехать со мной?
transliteration: Kuda ty khochesh poyekhat so mnoy?
english: Where do you want to go with me?

russian: Я хочу познакомиться с твоими родителями.
transliteration: Ya khochu poznakomitsya s tvoimi roditelyami.
english: I want to meet your parents.

russian: Расстояние — это не проблема для меня.
transliteration: Rasstoyaniye — eto ne problema dlya menya.
english: Distance is not a problem for me.
We can call each other every day.
I want to be with you.

russian: Какие у тебя планы на выходные?
transliteration: Kakiye u tebya plany na vykhodnye?
english: What are your plans for the weekend?

russian: Я не очень хорошо себя чувствую.
transliteration: Ya ne ochen khorosho sebya chuvstvuyu.

english: We have warm weather all year.

russian: У нас много гор и моря.
transliteration: U nas mnogo gor i morya.
english: We have many mountains and the sea.
Family is very important to us.
